title: Richly Roasted Croatian Pork Wrap
description: A pungent and creamy solo dinner dish featuring bok choi and ssam wrap, served on a cedar plank. This keto friendly meal is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the pork shoulder with paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Place the pork shoulder on the cedar plank and roast in the oven for 20 minutes per pound.
Meanwhile, heat a skillet over medium high heat and saute the chopped bok choi and minced garlic until tender.
Once the pork is cooked, let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Warm the ssam wrap pieces by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing a few slices of the pork onto a ssam wrap piece, followed by a spoonful of the sauteed bok choi and a dollop of sour cream.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
